title: distephanus henryi
intro: Distephanus henryi is a medicinal plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it a valuable resource in natural medicine. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating joint pain, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Distephanus henryi can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
